parsed.mechanism: Content-based expert-choice routing selects distinct tokens per attention head (as in MoSA), a mechanism repurposed to model how sigmoidal IRF–DNA binding routes transcriptional inputs to produce promoter-specific ultrasensitive activation rather than relying on IRF-NFκB cooperativity.
parsed.transfer: The per-head expert-choice sparse selection mechanism from A transfers to model the gene-specific input selection that ultrasensitive IRF–DNA binding performs in B.
parsed.open_problem: Can a learned expert-choice routing model predict which promoters acquire ultrasensitive specificity from sigmoidal IRF–DNA binding versus cooperative IRF-NFκB regulation?
parsed.niche_name: Expert-Choice Routing Models of Ultrasensitive Transcription-Factor Specificity
parsed.primary_quote: MoSA selects distinct tokens for each head with expert choice routing
